content.text: Increase the default worker-pool size constant from 8 to 16.

content.content:
package worker

// Pool tuning constants. These are compile-time defaults; operators can still
// override each one via the WORKER_* environment variables at startup.
const (
	DefaultPoolSize        = 8
	DefaultQueueDepth      = 1024
	DefaultShutdownGrace   = 30 // seconds
	DefaultTaskTimeout     = 120 // seconds
	DefaultHeartbeat       = 5 // seconds
	DefaultMaxRetries      = 4
	DefaultRetryBackoffMs  = 250
	DefaultDrainOnSIGTERM  = true
	DefaultMetricsEnabled  = true
	DefaultMetricsPort     = 9090
	DefaultProfilerEnabled = false
)

input.input:
*** Begin Patch
*** Update File: internal/worker/constants.go
@@ const (
-	DefaultPoolSize        = 8
+	DefaultPoolSize        = 16
 	DefaultQueueDepth      = 1024
 	DefaultShutdownGrace   = 30 // seconds
 	DefaultTaskTimeout     = 120 // seconds
 	DefaultHeartbeat       = 5 // seconds
 	DefaultMaxRetries      = 4
 	DefaultRetryBackoffMs  = 250
 	DefaultDrainOnSIGTERM  = true
 	DefaultMetricsEnabled  = true
 	DefaultMetricsPort     = 9090
 	DefaultProfilerEnabled = false
 )
*** End Patch
